title: Fracttalix Sentinel: Three-Channel Streaming Anomaly Detector
description: Fracttalix: a research corpus comprising the Fractal Rhythm Model (FRM) and Meta-Kaizen series. The FRM describes association dynamics via f(t) = B + A·exp(−λt)·cos(ωt+φ) across scales from quantum decoherence to cosmological structure. The Meta-Kaizen series (5 papers) derives a measurement-theoretic governance framework from six axioms. Includes Fracttalix Sentinel, a three-channel streaming anomaly detector implementing the FRM in a 26-step pipeline (zero dependencies). 21 papers, machine-readable AI layers with falsification predicates, and Dual Reader Standard (DRS) compliance.
notes: Theoretical foundation: Fractal Rhythm Model (FRM) — 11 axioms. Meta-Kaizen series — 5 papers deriving KVS from measurement-theoretic axioms. 21 corpus objects across two tracks. Introduced by Thomas Brennan with AI collaborators Claude (Anthropic) and Grok (xAI).
